You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/plans/details/tabs/Details/components/SettingsSection/components/GuestConversion/GuestConversionEditModal.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 42
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-color-200]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-color-200' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-u-color-200' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-color-200

Code context:
```
   41          <StackItem>
   42            <Text component={TextVariants.p} className="pf-v5-u-color-200">
   43              {t(

```

### Fix 2
Lines: 41, 49, 76, 95, 100
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-stackitem-component]:
Component <StackItem> has a new prop `component` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <StackItem> and determine if any should be moved to the `component` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <StackItem>{content} other children</StackItem>
  After:  <StackItem component=>other children</StackItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: StackItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Stack

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: StackItem
Prop: component
To: React.ReactNode

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.


### Fix 3

The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-color-200' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-u-color-200' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

### Fix 4
Line: 14
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-text-text-d-ts-textvariants-removed]:
Type-alias 'TextVariants' was removed (type-alias): Exported enum `TextVariants` was removed — migrate to `ContentVariants`.
  Matching props (use on `ContentVariants` instead): a, blockquote, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p, pre, small

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Text/Text.d.ts
Before: enum: TextVariants

Incident context:
  importedName: TextVariants
  localName: TextVariants
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
From: TextVariants
To: ContentVariants
Replacement: ContentVariants
Member mappings:
  h2 -> h2
  h4 -> h4
  h6 -> h6
  small -> small
  blockquote -> blockquote
  pre -> pre
  a -> a
  h5 -> h5
  h1 -> h1
  p -> p
  h3 -> h3

```
   13    Text,

   15  } from '@patternfly/react-core';

```

### Fix 5
Line: 13
Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className
  - Text.ouiaSafe  →  Content.ouiaSafe
  - Text.children  →  Content.children
  - Text.isVisitedLink  →  Content.isVisitedLink

Remove <Text> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove Text from the import statement.

Incident context:

  module: @patternfly/react-core

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/plans/details/tabs/Details/components/SettingsSection/components/GuestConversion/GuestConversionEditModal.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

1	import { type FC, useState } from 'react';
     2	
     3	import { HelpIconPopover } from '@components/common/HelpIconPopover/HelpIconPopover';
     4	import ModalForm from '@components/ModalForm/ModalForm';
     5	import {
     6	  Alert,
     7	  AlertVariant,
     8	  Checkbox,
     9	  Flex,
    10	  FormGroup,
    11	  Stack,
    12	  StackItem,
    13	  Text,
    14	  TextVariants,
    15	} from '@patternfly/react-core';
    16	import { ForkliftTrans, useForkliftTranslation } from '@utils/i18n';
    17	
    18	import type { EditPlanProps } from '../../utils/types';
    19	
    20	import { patchGuestConversion } from './utils/patchGuestConversion';
    21	import { getSkipGuestConversion, getUseCompatibilityMode } from './utils/utils';
    22	
    23	const GuestConversionEditModal: FC<EditPlanProps> = ({ resource }) => {
    24	  const { t } = useForkliftTranslation();
    25	  const [skipGuestConversion, setSkipGuestConversion] = useState<boolean>(
    26	    Boolean(getSkipGuestConversion(resource)),
    27	  );
    28	  const [useCompatibilityMode, setUseCompatibilityMode] = useState<boolean>(
    29	    getUseCompatibilityMode(resource) ?? true,
    30	  );
    31	
    32	  return (
    33	    <ModalForm
    34	      title={t('Guest conversion mode')}
    35	      testId="guest-conversion-mode-modal"
    36	      onConfirm={async () =>
    37	        patchGuestConversion({ newValue: skipGuestConversion, resource, useCompatibilityMode })
    38	      }
    39	    >
    40	      <Stack hasGutter>
    41	        <StackItem>
    42	          <Text component={TextVariants.p} className="pf-v5-u-color-200">
    43	            {t(
    44	              'Guest conversion uses the virt-v2v tool to modify all of the internal configurations of the VMs in the plan to make them compatible with Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization.',
    45	            )}
    46	          </Text>
    47	        </StackItem>
    48	
    49	        <StackItem>
    50	          <FormGroup fieldId="skip-guest-conversion" className="checkbox-form-group">
    51	            <Checkbox
    52	              id="skip-guest-conversion-checkbox"
    53	              data-testid="skip-guest-conversion-checkbox"
    54	              label={t('Skip guest conversion')}
    55	              isChecked={skipGuestConversion}
    56	              onChange={(_, checked) => {
    57	                setSkipGuestConversion(checked);
    58	              }}
    59	            />
    60	          </FormGroup>
    61	
    62	          {skipGuestConversion && (
    63	            <Alert
    64	              isPlain
    65	              isInline
    66	              variant={AlertVariant.info}
    67	              className="pf-v6-u-mt-xs pf-v6-u-ml-lg"
    68	              title={t(
    69	                "If skipped, the VMs' disk data will be duplicated byte-for-byte, allowing for faster conversions. However, there is a risk that the VMs might not function properly and it is not recommended.",
    70	              )}
    71	            />
    72	          )}
    73	        </StackItem>
    74	
    75	        {skipGuestConversion && (
    76	          <StackItem>
    77	            <FormGroup fieldId="use-compatibility-mode" className="checkbox-form-group">
    78	              <Flex
    79	                alignItems={{ default: 'alignItemsBaseline' }}
    80	                spaceItems={{ default: 'spaceItemsNone' }}
    81	              >
    82	                <Checkbox
    83	                  id="use-compatibility-mode-checkbox"
    84	                  data-testid="use-compatibility-mode-checkbox"
    85	                  label={t('Use compatibility mode')}
    86	                  isChecked={useCompatibilityMode}
    87	                  onChange={(_, checked) => {
    88	                    setUseCompatibilityMode(checked);
    89	                  }}
    90	                />
    91	
    92	                <HelpIconPopover>
    93	                  <ForkliftTrans>
    94	                    <Stack hasGutter>
    95	                      <StackItem>
    96	                        If checked, compatibility devices (SATA bus, E1000E NIC) will be used to
    97	                        ensure boot-ability.
    98	                      </StackItem>
    99	
   100	                      <StackItem>
   101	                        If unchecked, high-performance VirtIO devices will be used. This requires
   102	                        VirtIO drivers already installed in the source VM.
   103	                      </StackItem>
   104	                    </Stack>
   105	                  </ForkliftTrans>
   106	                </HelpIconPopover>
   107	              </Flex>
   108	            </FormGroup>
   109	
   110	            {!useCompatibilityMode && (
   111	              <Alert
   112	                isPlain
   113	                isInline
   114	                variant={AlertVariant.warning}
   115	                className="pf-v6-u-mt-xs pf-v6-u-ml-lg"
   116	                title={t(
   117	                  "If you don't use compatibility mode, you must have VirtIO drivers already installed in the source VM.",
   118	                )}
   119	              />
   120	            )}
   121	          </StackItem>
   122	        )}
   123	      </Stack>
   124	    </ModalForm>
   125	  );
   126	};
   127	
   128	export default GuestConversionEditModal;

    45	            )}
    46	          </Text>
    47	        </StackItem>
    48	
    49	        <StackItem>
    50	          <FormGroup fieldId="skip-guest-conversion" className="checkbox-form-group">
    51	            <Checkbox
    52	              id="skip-guest-conversion-checkbox"
    53	              data-testid="skip-guest-conversion-checkbox"
    54	              label={t('Skip guest conversion')}
    55	              isChecked={skipGuestConversion}
    56	              onChange={(_, checked) => {
    57	                setSkipGuestConversion(checked);
    58	              }}
    59	            />
    60	          </FormGroup>
    61	
    62	          {skipGuestConversion && (
    63	            <Alert
    64	              isPlain
    65	              isInline
    66	              variant={AlertVariant.info}
    67	              className="pf-v6-u-mt-xs pf-v6-u-ml-lg"
    68	              title={t(
    69	                "If skipped, the VMs' disk data will be duplicated byte-for-byte, allowing for faster conversions. However, there is a risk that the VMs might not function properly and it is not recommended.",
    70	              )}
    71	            />
    72	          )}
    73	        </StackItem>
    74	
    75	        {skipGuestConversion && (
    76	          <StackItem>
    77	            <FormGroup fieldId="use-compatibility-mode" className="checkbox-form-group">
    78	              <Flex
    79	                alignItems={{ default: 'alignItemsBaseline' }}
    80	                spaceItems={{ default: 'spaceItemsNone' }}
    81	              >
    82	                <Checkbox
    83	                  id="use-compatibility-mode-checkbox"
    84	                  data-testid="use-compatibility-mode-checkbox"
    85	                  label={t('Use compatibility mode')}
    86	                  isChecked={useCompatibilityMode}
    87	                  onChange={(_, checked) => {
    88	                    setUseCompatibilityMode(checked);
    89	                  }}
    90	                />
    91	
    92	                <HelpIconPopover>
    93	                  <ForkliftTrans>
    94	                    <Stack hasGutter>
    95	                      <StackItem>
    96	                        If checked, compatibility devices (SATA bus, E1000E NIC) will be used to
    97	                        ensure boot-ability.
    98	                      </StackItem>
    99	
   100	                      <StackItem>
   101	                        If unchecked, high-performance VirtIO devices will be used. This requires
   102	                        VirtIO drivers already installed in the source VM.
   103	                      </StackItem>
   104	                    </Stack>
   105	                  </ForkliftTrans>
   106	                </HelpIconPopover>
   107	              </Flex>
   108	            </FormGroup>
   109	
   110	            {!useCompatibilityMode && (
   111	              <Alert
   112	                isPlain
   113	                isInline
   114	                variant={AlertVariant.warning}
   115	                className="pf-v6-u-mt-xs pf-v6-u-ml-lg"
   116	                title={t(
   117	                  "If you don't use compatibility mode, you must have VirtIO drivers already installed in the source VM.",
   118	                )}
   119	              />
   120	            )}
   121	          </StackItem>

   123	      </Stack>
   124	    </ModalForm>
   125	  );
   126	};

content.text:
Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1 & Fix 3** (both about the same thing): Line 42 has `className="pf-v5-u-color-200"` — this CSS class was removed with no equivalent. I need to remove this className prop.

**Fix 4**: `TextVariants` was removed, replaced by `ContentVariants`. I need to change the import from `TextVariants` to `ContentVariants` and update all usages.

**Fix 5**: `Text` component is deprecated, replaced by `Content`. I need to change the import from `Text` to `Content` and update all JSX usages.

**Fix 2**: `StackItem` has a new `component` prop. Looking at how `StackItem` is used here — each contains either `Text`/`Content`, `FormGroup`, or plain text children. The `component` prop is of type `React.ReactNode` which is unusual for a "component" prop (usually it's an element type). Looking at the usage, the children of `StackItem` are standard content children — there's no clear indication any should move to a `component` prop. The fix says "Review... and determine if any should be moved." Since these are all standard children (form groups, text content), I'll leave them as children — no change needed for Fix 2.

Now, combining Fixes 1, 3, 4, and 5:
- `Text` → `Content` (import and JSX)
- `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` (import and usage)
- Remove `className="pf-v5-u-color-200"` from the Content element on line 42

Let me apply all changes:
Now let me verify the final state of the file:

    55	              isChecked={skipGuestConversion}
    56	              onChange={(_, checked) => {
    57	                setSkipGuestConversion(checked);
    58	              }}
    59	            />
    60	          </FormGroup>
    61	
    62	          {skipGuestConversion && (
    63	            <Alert
    64	              isPlain
    65	              isInline
    66	              variant={AlertVariant.info}
    67	              className="pf-v6-u-mt-xs pf-v6-u-ml-lg"
    68	              title={t(
    69	                "If skipped, the VMs' disk data will be duplicated byte-for-byte, allowing for faster conversions. However, there is a risk that the VMs might not function properly and it is not recommended.",
    70	              )}
    71	            />
    72	          )}
    73	        </StackItem>
    74	
    75	        {skipGuestConversion && (
    76	          <StackItem>
    77	            <FormGroup fieldId="use-compatibility-mode" className="checkbox-form-group">
    78	              <Flex
    79	                alignItems={{ default: 'alignItemsBaseline' }}
    80	                spaceItems={{ default: 'spaceItemsNone' }}
    81	              >
    82	                <Checkbox
    83	                  id="use-compatibility-mode-checkbox"
    84	                  data-testid="use-compatibility-mode-checkbox"
    85	                  label={t('Use compatibility mode')}
    86	                  isChecked={useCompatibilityMode}
    87	                  onChange={(_, checked) => {
    88	                    setUseCompatibilityMode(checked);
    89	                  }}
    90	                />
    91	
    92	                <HelpIconPopover>
    93	                  <ForkliftTrans>
    94	                    <Stack hasGutter>
    95	                      <StackItem>
    96	                        If checked, compatibility devices (SATA bus, E1000E NIC) will be used to
    97	                        ensure boot-ability.
    98	                      </StackItem>
    99	
   100	                      <StackItem>
   101	                        If unchecked, high-performance VirtIO devices will be used. This requires
   102	                        VirtIO drivers already installed in the source VM.
   103	                      </StackItem>
   104	                    </Stack>
   105	                  </ForkliftTrans>
   106	                </HelpIconPopover>
   107	              </Flex>
   108	            </FormGroup>
   109	
   110	            {!useCompatibilityMode && (
   111	              <Alert
   112	                isPlain
   113	                isInline
   114	                variant={AlertVariant.warning}
   115	                className="pf-v6-u-mt-xs pf-v6-u-ml-lg"
   116	                title={t(
   117	                  "If you don't use compatibility mode, you must have VirtIO drivers already installed in the source VM.",
   118	                )}
   119	              />
   120	            )}
   121	          </StackItem>
   122	        )}
   123	      </Stack>
   124	    </ModalForm>
   125	  );
   126	};
   127	
   128	export default GuestConversionEditModal;

content.text:
The file looks correct. All changes have been applied cleanly. Let me verify the import ordering is reasonable (Content/ContentVariants after StackItem is fine — alphabetical would put them before Checkbox, but the original order had Text/TextVariants at the end too, so this is consistent).

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-color-200` | ✅ Applied | Removed `className="pf-v5-u-color-200"` from the `<Content>` element (line 42). The class has no v6 equivalent. |
| **Fix 2** | `sd-new-absorbing-prop-stackitem-component` | ⚠️ No change needed | Reviewed all 5 `<StackItem>` usages. Each contains standard children (a `<Content>` block, `<FormGroup>`, or plain text). None of these children should be moved to the `component` prop — they are legitimate children content, not a component type override. |
| **Fix 3** | `semver-css-class-removed-u-color-200` | ✅ Applied | Same change as Fix 1 — `className="pf-v5-u-color-200"` removed (both rules target the same line/class). |
| **Fix 4** | `semver-...-textvariants-removed` | ✅ Applied | Renamed import `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` (line 14) and updated usage `TextVariants.p` → `ContentVariants.p` (line 42). |
| **Fix 5** | `semver-text-component-import-deprecated` | ✅ Applied | Renamed import `Text` → `Content` (line 13) and updated JSX `<Text>...</Text>` → `<Content>...</Content>` (lines 42, 46). All props (`component`) carried over to `Content` as specified in the property mapping. |
